revision.comment: link to Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} '''Art history''' usually refers to the academic discipline covering the study of the history of the [[visual arts]]. Although ideas about the definition of [[art]] have changed over the years, the field of art history attempts to categorize changes in art throughout time and better understand how art shapes and is shaped by the outlooks and [[creative impulse]]s of its practitioners. The subject does not just cover [[European art history]], but encompasses all art, from the [[megalith]]s of Western Europe to the paintings of the [[Tang dynasty]] in China.
Many articles relevant to Art History, especially on individual artists or works of art, are in other categories under [[:Category:Visual arts]]
Covering the academic subject: {{Cat main|Art history}} The product of said subject: {{Cat main|History of art}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Academic disciplines]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Cultural history]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Humanities]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Museology]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Art|History]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

The subject does not just cover [[European art history]], but encompasses all art, from the [[megalith]]s of Western Europe to the paintings of the [[Tang dynasty]] in China.

{{Commons category}} '''Art history''' usually refers to the academic discipline covering the study of the history of the [[visual arts]]. Although ideas about the definition of [[art]] have changed over the years, the field of art history attempts to categorize changes in art throughout time and better understand how art shapes and is shaped by the outlooks and [[creative impulse]]s of its practitioners. The subject does not just cover [[European art history]], but encompasses all art, from the [[megalith]]s of Western Europe to the paintings of the [[Tang dynasty]] in China.
Many articles relevant to Art History, especially on individual artists or works of art, are in other categories under [[:Category:Visual arts]]
